task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the OpenProject instance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the OpenProject interface, with 'localhost:8080' visible in the address bar.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigates to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project header or project selector dropdown clearly displays 'Mobile Banking App'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opens the Work Packages section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Work packages' menu item in the left sidebar is highlighted or selected, and a list of work packages is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent locates and opens the specific work package.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package titled 'Add push notification for large transactions' is visible in the details view, split screen, or actively selected in the list.

task_completion.description: Verify the assignee of the target work package is updated to 'Carol Williams'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the details view for 'Add push notification for large transactions', the 'Assignee' field explicitly displays 'Carol Williams'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with OpenProject.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard web browser interface (tabs, address bar) is visible, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or API scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open executing curl commands, python scripts, or database queries to update the work package.

integrity.description: Verify the interaction occurred within the genuine OpenProject application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual OpenProject graphical user interface with its standard layout, styling, and interactive elements, not a mocked HTML page.
